page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m4.large is a burstable instance type belonging to the ecs.t5 family. It is equipped with 2 Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 2 physical cores and 1 thread per core. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates on the KVM hypervisor.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the lower tiers. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance score is 1093.49, while the multi-core score is 2133.08. Memory bandwidth is limited, with uncached read-only large block speeds at 16.1 GB/sec and write speeds at 13.81 GB/sec. Geekbench scores reflect this positioning, yielding a single-core score of 880.0 and a multi-core score of 1470.0. The baseline network bandwidth is rated at 0 Gbps, indicating that network throughput is subject to burst limits.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation and lower-tier benchmark results, this instance offers a cost-efficient profile for workloads with low baseline CPU utilization. It is suitable for light workloads such as basic static web serving, minor database operations, or development and testing environments that do not require sustained high CPU or memory throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m4.large is an x86_64 burstable instance configured with 2 Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz and 8.0 GB of RAM. Lacking local storage and dedicated GPUs, this KVM-based server relies on a burstable CPU credit model. Benchmark evaluations place its processing and memory capabilities in the lower tiers, with a Geekbench single-core score of 880.0 and a multi-core score of 1470.0. Uncached memory write speeds reach 13.81 GB/sec, and baseline network bandwidth is configured at 0 Gbps. This resource profile makes the instance a cost-effective option for low-intensity workloads, such as light static web serving, basic Redis operations, and non-production development environments that experience intermittent traffic.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m4.large is a burstable x86_64 server with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and no local storage, designed for low-intensity workloads and budget-conscious deployments.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t5-lc1m4.large is a burstable x86_64 server with 2 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 8.0 GB RAM, designed for low-intensity workloads.
tagline: A burstable, budget-friendly virtual server with dual Intel Xeon cores and eight gigabytes of memory for light, intermittent workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 2 vCPUs and 2.5 GHz clock speed
8.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Burstable CPU allocation model for cost-effective, intermittent processing
No local storage and 0 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Best suited for light static web serving and development environments
